overview.short: Usri Falls is a waterfall located in Giridih district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
overview.description: Usri Falls is a waterfall located in Giridih district in the Indian state of Jharkhand. It is a popular tourist and picnic spot. Ushree means a "beautiful source".

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Usri Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Usri Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Usri Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (138 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Usri Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Usri Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Usri Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Usri Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Usri Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Taratanr, Pertodih, Giridih Coalfield, Dandidih.
